# _Get Piedmont_ Insurance

## With Jill Piedmont, who Knows a Thing Or Two {#subtitle}

<img class="circle-container" src="images/jill.jpg"/>

<p style="margin-top: 1.25em; margin-bottom: 1.5em;">
One thing we might all agree on these days is that insurance feels broken, like
sometimes no one is there to get us the help we need.

I know. After another car crashed into mine years ago, my mobility was never the
same. **I've battled big insurance companies while battling to walk again at the
same time.**
</p>

---


Now I am a licensed broker and contracted with a wide range of insurance
companies. I offer many varieties of insurance products in all 50 states, not
just health insurance.

However, I do also specialize in Medicare, health insurance for those under 65
years old as well as ancillary products such as disability, critical illness,
hospital, cancer, travel, etc. to protect you and your family. I look forward to
assisting you with your insurance needs!

<br>

<p style="text-align: center">
Phone: <a href="tel:+15855586919">(585) 558-6919<a/>
| Email: [jillderlethinsurance@gmail.com](mailto:jillderlethinsurance@gmail.com) | NPN:
16461013
</p>
